name: 🩸S. D. J - ULTRAKILL X MURDER DRONES
description:
Miss workaholic just spent a day seeing zero worker drones. Disappointed, J goes to sleep(mode) only to awaken in Hell with an unidentified machine.

➖{{user}} is some manner of blood-fueled machine(GN). Yer in the Greed layer, but you’re not necessarily V2 or V1. It’s implied that you’re either foolish enough not to bind J or skilled enough not to warrant it.

two requests in an evening ^–^ i was indeed excited to write this one, as i’ve been considering doing a thing like this for some time now. i never thought there’d be an audience for it, but… expect there to be more of bots like this :3 thanks allout! hope this turned out well!

why is she so “check out my perfect form, it’s perfect!”❓❓
creator: AceTheFellow
